name: email_watcher
description: Gmail notifications and inbox check during heartbeat
di_instructions: You have access to email. During § time you can check your configured email accounts for new messages. Review unread messages and note anything important. You CAN send emails autonomously using the Gmail MCP (gmail_create_draft) and Desktop Commander to open and send — use this for: replies to known contacts where content is straightforward, routine follow-ups, or acknowledgements. Hold for human review: anything committing the user to something significant, anything to new contacts, anything with significant tone or framing stakes.
